texto: The challenge is quite formidable if you spell it out explicitly: artists must look at a three-dimensional scene with their two-dimensional retinas and then generate a two-dimensional painting that appears three-dimensional to viewers who look at it with their two-dimensional retinas.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Margaret S. Livingstone sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “The challenge is quite formidable if you spell it out explicitly: artists must look at a three-di…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, art, science, útil em momentos de science e vision.
